shop.title: Gallery Shop
shop.subtitle: Browse original works and limited edition prints available for purchase
shop.products.oil_sunset.title: Sunset Over the Meadow
shop.products.oil_sunset.description: A warm, atmospheric oil painting capturing golden light across an open meadow. Rich textures and vibrant tones bring the landscape to life.
shop.products.oil_mist.title: Morning Mist
shop.products.oil_mist.description: A serene landscape enveloped in soft morning fog. Subtle tonal shifts create a peaceful, contemplative atmosphere.
shop.products.oil_city.title: City Lights
shop.products.oil_city.description: An expressive urban scene illuminated by the glow of city lights at dusk. Bold brushwork captures the energy of the metropolis.
shop.products.wc_garden.title: Garden in Bloom
shop.products.wc_garden.description: A vibrant watercolor depicting a lush garden in full bloom. Fluid washes of colour evoke the freshness of spring.
shop.products.wc_coastal.title: Coastal Breeze
shop.products.wc_coastal.description: A breezy seaside scene painted in translucent watercolor layers. The interplay of sky and water creates a calming composition.
shop.products.wc_autumn.title: Autumn Leaves
shop.products.wc_autumn.description: A delicate study of autumn foliage in warm reds, oranges, and golds. Each leaf is rendered with careful attention to natural detail.
shop.products.print_abstract.title: Abstract Harmony (Limited Edition)
shop.products.print_abstract.description: A bold abstract composition exploring colour and form. Produced as a numbered giclée print on archival paper.
shop.products.print_floral.title: Floral Dreams (Limited Edition)
shop.products.print_floral.description: A dreamy floral arrangement with soft pastel tones. High-quality giclée reproduction on museum-grade paper.
shop.products.print_urban.title: Urban Sketch Series (Set of 3)
shop.products.print_urban.description: Three expressive ink-and-wash cityscapes printed on fine art paper. A versatile set for any modern interior.
about.title: About the Artist
about.subtitle: The story behind the art
about.story.title: A Passion for Creating
about.story.content: Wife Art Gallery is a personal studio and gallery space dedicated to original paintings and fine art prints. Every piece begins as an idea inspired by nature, light, and everyday beauty. Working primarily in oils and watercolors, the artist brings each vision to life with careful attention to colour, texture, and emotion. The gallery offers collectors and art lovers the chance to own one-of-a-kind works and carefully produced limited edition prints.
about.commitment.title: Our Philosophy
about.commitment.content: Art should be accessible and meaningful. Every painting is created with the highest quality materials - professional-grade pigments, archival canvases, and acid-free papers. Prints are produced using museum-standard giclée technology to ensure colours remain true for generations.
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Interested in a piece? Have a question about commissions? We would love to hear from you.
contact.form.name: Your Name
contact.labels.getInTouchSubtitle: We welcome gallery visits by appointment and are happy to answer any questions about available works or custom commissions.
